metadata.description: Data analytics tools for Claude — statistical analysis, machine learning, forecasting, and more. Upload your data, ask a question, get an interactive report.

plugins.name: mcp-analytics
plugins.description: Upload a CSV, ask a question, and a team of specialist agents builds a custom analysis you own — regression, clustering, forecasting, A/B tests, churn prediction — delivered as an interactive HTML report with charts and AI insights.
